title: ROSHIELD 2 x Rat Traps - Professional Quality & Heavy Duty Pest Control Traps for Instant Kill - Large Reusable & Easy Set Rodent Solution
features: PROFESSIONAL QUALITY - Roshield rat traps are used within the pest control industry as a reliable and fast method of rat control and as an alternative to rodenticides and cages; our traps feature a high strength spring, sensitive trigger mechanism and welded kill bar, which will result in a quicker and more humane control solution.

INSTANT PERFORMANCE - Our rat traps kill instantly. The heavy-duty and robust spring combined with the welded kill bar will humanly and quickly dispatch rats that feed within the kill area of the trap; the force of the mechanism guarantees maximum effectiveness, which results in a quick and humane control method.

DESIGNED FOR RATS - Are traps are not universal; whilst they can work with mice they are made specifically for rat control and are larger than the smaller mouse alternatives. The larger trigger plate will react specifically to rats which for a better catch rate without false triggering.

EASY TO USE - We include instructions for the use of the rat traps and we also have support videos for both setting and placement of the traps. Traps can easily be set by a responsible user and require no previous experience. In addition, our traps can be installed within Roshield rodent bait stations.

RAT TRAP KIT SIZE - This listing is for 2 x Roshield rat traps and would be suitable for a low infestation area. Comprehensive instructions are included within the kit, and additional trapping support is available on request. Rat traps are reusable.
description: Product Description Professional quality traps for the control of rats High-quality rat traps designed for the UK professional industry for reliable control of rats within internal and external environments. Not all rat traps are manufactured the same; whilst they may look similar in design and appearance, our rat traps vary in several ways, including a welded kill bar, a more sensitive trigger plate, fast catch release and most importantly, a potent spring that can result in a much quicker and humane kill. Before undertaking more aggressive rodenticide treatments or treating rats with known bait shyness, it is recommended as the first choice. Instructions included the safe placement and trapping of rats within the package. Support how-to-set video is also available. It is essential to follow the instructions and prevent children and non-target animals from gaining access. Placement should either be within enclosed environments such as active rat voids, attic, sheds etc. If trapping externally, an additional tamper-resistant bait station (not included) should be used to restrict access. They are manufactured exclusively for Roshield. Roshield Professional Traps - What's the difference? Welded kill bar Our Roshield trap kill bar is welded with an outer red plastic sleeve, allowing more force to be transferred from the kill bar to the rat's body whilst remaining durable. Most rat traps contain a plastic sleeve that acts as a joiner, and the internal kill bar is not welded. High strength spring Its often for manufactures to save money by using fewer materials, often in and around the spring area. Therefore, our Roshield traps contain highly tensioned springs, with an additional fourth loop resulting in a kill bar that can undertake the necessary control action. Sensitive trigger plate & catch Often overlooked but again an essential part of the trap mechanism. Too hard and the trap will not fire, and too sensitive, the trap will fire before the rat is in the ultimate position. We believe that our Roshield trap has the ultimate balance, which results in a successful trigger resulting in fewer misfires and quicker control results. Main trap features Welded kill bar High strength spring Sensitive trigger plate Rear fixing holes Large central baiting cup Where to set the traps Due to the high strength and damage caused to children and non-target animals, we recommend that consideration be undertaken to where the traps are placed. Traps are best placed in areas that rats are active, and when possible, directly within enclosed voids such as under floorboards, behind kitchen plinths, attic spaces or lockable sheds. We do not recommend placing traps in the open such as in living environments, under chairs etc., as rats are more cautious and are unlikely to accept them. If placed in external environments, we recommend using our lockable tamper-resistant bait station (not included within the listing), which will help prevent children and non-target access. Boxes should be placed around buildings, fence lines and not directly over nesting sites. Kit packs, including our box and traps, are available to purchase separately. As with all rodent treatments, removing any competing safe food sources; otherwise, control can be complicated and lengthy. How to use our traps Bait trap within central trigger plate Bait the trap with a suitable attractant such as peanut butter, chocolate spread or our popular rodent attractant syringe bait. Cheese is not considered an appropriate appeal. Its also recommended placing some bait around the trap to encourage feeding. Place trap in area of infestation Find a suitable place to set the trap. This may be under kitchen cupboards by removing the lower plinths, under floorboards, within a controlled environment such as a lockable shed or attic. If placing outside use within a tamper-resistant bait station. Set trap by pulling back the top bar Set trap by pulling back the top bar until it clicks into the rear catch. Once primed, you should not touch the front plate. Instructions are included within the package and support videos for additional help if required by the user. Dispose of rat body in general waste Once the rat has been trapped, the body should be doubled bagged, zipped tied and disposed of in the general waste. 2 x Roshield Rat Traps 4 x Roshield Rat Traps 6 x Roshield Rat Traps 1 x Rat Trap & Box Kit 2 x Rat Trap & Box Kit Add To Basket Add To Basket Buying Options Buying Options Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.2 out of 5 stars 5,059 4.3 out of 5 stars 1,389 4.6 out of 5 stars 14 4.2 out of 5 stars 5,042 4.2 out of 5 stars 5,042 Price £9.49 £ 9 . 49 £15.96 £ 15 . 96 — no data — no data £26.49 £ 26 . 49 Rat trap quantity 2 4 6 1 2 Infestation size Low Low-Medium Medium+ Low Low-Medium Inside use ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ Outside use no data no data no data ✓ ✓ Includes safety box no data no data no data ✓ ✓ Instructions ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ Support video ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓
